'''Stridus Darkov''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] businessman alive during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|man]] working in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Stridus Darkov owned a fringe enterprise during his life. At some point during his career, Darkov came to trust one of his employees, a young female named [[Alara Fax]]. To her own ends, Fax used Darkov's trust, friendship and his [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to bankroll her own endeavors until she had the means to start her own company, [[Fax Ventures]].<ref name="NRC" />
